title: galium scabriusculum
intro: Galium scabriusculum, also known as Rough Bedstraw, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Rubiaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as relieving menstrual cramps, reducing fever, and supporting urinary system function. Galium scabriusculum can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although its efficacy and safety need further scientific validation.
